title: lippia suffruticosa
intro: Lippia suffruticosa, also known as Mexican oregano, is a shrub-like plant native to the Americas and is a member of the Verbenaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lippia suffruticosa include the reduction of fever, the relief of respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, and the treatment of skin conditions like acne and wounds. Lippia suffruticosa is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
